title: Hornet Removal in Longwood, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Longwood, Bronx. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed exterminators serving Southern Boulevard area. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Longwood? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout this vibrant Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians protect Longwood homes and businesses from dangerous hornet nests with proven removal methods and competitive pricing from $350 to $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Longwood residents for years with same-day hornet removal services and guaranteed results. Our experienced team understands the unique pest challenges of Longwood's diverse residential and commercial properties, providing safe removal without disrupting your daily routine.
localContext: Longwood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, row houses near Southern Boulevard, and proximity to green spaces like Playground Fifty-Two creates ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, awnings, and building corners. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and older architecture often attract hornets seeking sheltered areas to build their nests during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Longwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Longwood. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We prioritize emergency calls involving aggressive hornets or nests near entryways.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe hornet nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Longwood apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests on Longwood's older apartment buildings, particularly under fire escapes, window air conditioning units, and building overhangs. The neighborhood's architectural features provide protected spots that attract hornets looking for secure nesting locations.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved treatments and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters. We advise residents and pets to remain indoors during treatment, and the area is safe to access shortly after completion.
